final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a product launch campaign featuring 长安起源Q06.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic, high-impact visual aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a wide horizontal cover layout with title and subtitle prominently placed
Subject: must include the 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, translucent and visually striking background — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a powerful, awe-inspiring atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with 长安 brand tonality — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sense of depth and translucency in the background — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (primary title), "9月上市" (subtitle)
Constraints: must preserve a clean hierarchy between title and subtitle; background must not overpower the text
Avoid:
